checksum.description: A unique identifier that represents the current state of the slot type and its properties.

created_date.description: The date and time when the slot type was created.

description.description: A brief explanation or details about what the slot type represents or its purpose.

enumeration_value.description: A list of possible values for the slot type, including synonyms for each value.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the slot type.

last_updated_date.description: The date and time when the slot type was last modified.

value_selection_strategy.description: The strategy used by AWS Lex to select a value for the slot when multiple values are possible.
